nasb.text: Let them be before the Lord continually, That He may cut off their memory from the earth;

esv.text: Let them be before the Lord continually, that he may cut off the memory of them from the earth!

cnv.text: 願這些罪常在耶和華面前， 好使他們的名號從地上被除掉。

ccb.text: 愿耶和华永不忘记他的罪恶， 把他从世上铲除。

csbs.text: 愿这些罪一直在耶和华面前， 愿耶和华把他们的名号从地上剪除；
